title: NLP-012-describe-rnn-architecture-and-applications-in-nlp.原理与应用
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-012 Describe RNN architecture and applications in NLP.

 12. Describe RNN architecture and applications in NLP.
答案要点:
- 结构: 循环连接，隐藏状态传递序列信息
- 变体:
  - Simple RNN (梯度消失)
  - LSTM (门控机制：forget, input, output)
  - GRU (简化版 LSTM)
- 应用: 
  - Language Modeling
  - Machine Translation (Encoder-Decoder)
  - Text Generation
  - Time Series on Text
- 局限: 长距离依赖、无法并行

质量评分: 93/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

---

---

Category: NLP...
